plugins.name: clicky-keys
plugins.description: Audio feedback for Claude Code - hear keyboard typing sounds while Claude is working

plugins.name: voice-multiplexer
plugins.description: Remote voice interaction with multiple Claude Code sessions. Talk to your running Claude sessions from anywhere — switch between them and control them by voice.

plugins.name: imprint
plugins.description: Train a behavioral profile from your Claude session history. Learns your work style, communication preferences, and quality expectations — then injects them into every session.
